question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 10.00% on 2026-03-28 for the Metaculus question "Will Nvidia's stock price close below $100 on any day in 2026?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP on "Will NVDA close below $100 in 2026?" will exceed 10% on March 28. The CP is currently exactly at the 10% threshold, making this a boundary case. The dominant signal is the steady downward CP trend (15% → 10% over 5 weeks), driven by NVDA's strong fundamentals ($180 price, 73% revenue growth, 90% AI chip share) and the GTC 2026 conference (March 16-19) which historically boosts NVDA 5-7%. The main upside risk for CP is the Iran war (started Feb 28), which has pushed oil to $110+ and the S&P down 5.3%. However, the war's effect on CP was temporary (11% → 12.1% → 10%), suggesting forecasters don't see it as materially threatening NVDA's path to $100. With 769 forecasters and a declining trend, the median CP is more likely to drift below 10% than above it, but the boundary position means modest upward pressure could resolve YES.

factors.description: Downward CP trend: CP declined from 15% to 10% over 5 weeks, showing consistent downward pressure as forecasters see NVDA remaining far from $100
NVDA fundamentals extremely strong: 73% revenue growth, $78B Q1 guidance, 90% AI chip market share, analyst consensus $265-274 target. Stock at $180 needs 44.5% decline to reach $100
GTC 2026 conference March 16-19: Historically boosts NVDA 5-7%. Could push stock to $190+, making $100 even more distant and pushing CP below 10%
Iran war ongoing since Feb 28: Oil at $110+, major supply disruption, market uncertainty. S&P already down 5.3% from high. Could escalate further and cause broader market crash
CP exactly at threshold (10.00%): Any small upward movement resolves YES. Being on the knife-edge means even modest changes in sentiment could push above
War effect on CP was temporary: CP bumped from 11% to 12.1% after war started then fell back to 10% by Mar 14, suggesting forecasters don't see war as making NVDA $100 likely

reasoning:
**Forecast: 35% probability (logit: -0.6)**

Key reasoning:

- **CP at knife-edge**: The community prediction is exactly at the 10.00% threshold, so any small movement determines the outcome
- **Downward trend favors NO**: CP has declined steadily from 15% → 10% over 5 weeks despite an active war
- **NVDA fundamentals very strong**: At $180, the stock needs a 44.5% drop to reach $100. Revenue growing 73%, analyst targets of $265-274
- **GTC conference catalyst**: Starting today (March 16-19), historically adds 5-7% to NVDA. A strong GTC would push CP below 10%
- **Iran war risk**: The main upside risk for CP — oil at $110+, markets stressed. But the war's effect on CP was temporary (11% → 12.1% → 10%), suggesting forecasters already incorporated this
- **Random walk simulation**: Pure model gives ~17%, scenario analysis gives ~35%. I weight toward 35% given structural uncertainty from the war
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will Nvidia's stock price close below $100 on any day in 2026?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/40972)
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/40972) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-03-28 14:48:24 is higher than 10.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 10.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-03-28 14:48:24, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
